query:
ALTER TABLE job_listings 
ADD COLUMN salary_min INT,
ADD COLUMN salary_max INT,
ADD COLUMN salary_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'annual',
ADD COLUMN experience_required VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN accommodation VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN noc_code VARCHAR(10),
ADD COLUMN teer_level INT,
ADD COLUMN lmia_available INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN visa_sponsorship INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN posted_by INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL;
